generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how overblown preparedness programs drain resources from real security needs. The current push for expanded civil defense is a classic case of politicians chasing headlines while ignoring actual threats. We need to focus on proven deterrence strategies, not waste money on feel-good measures that do little to protect citizens. #NationalSecurity #SmartDefense
